posts.message:
🚜🎉 Happy 4th Birthday, Wyatt! 🎉🚜
Our little farm boy is officially 4 (yesterday)! From chasing chickens and feeding the animals to getting his boots muddy and keeping us all laughing, you make every day on the farm brighter.
You’ve got the biggest heart, the wildest imagination, and a love for farm life that makes us so proud. Watching you grow, learn, and explore this life with us is the greatest gift.
Here’s to more adventures, more animals, and lots more tractor rides! 🚜💚
We love you more than a billion!! 
Happy Birthday, buddy! 🐖🐓🎂

🐖 Pork Update from Roswell Family Farm 🐖

We’ve got just 4 larger pigs left, and all 4 are expected to be 300+ pounds hanging weight.

We also still have 13 smaller pigs available.

We’re proud to offer pork through our partnership with Spofford Farm. They play a big role in raising these pigs, and we help throughout the process to bring quality local pork to our customers here in the Mohawk Valley.

If you’ve been thinking about reserving one, now’s the time before they’re spoken for.

Send us a message for details or to reserve yours.

Roswell Family Farm
Salisbury, NY

#RoswellFamilyFarm #SpoffordFarm #LocalPork #MohawkValley #SalisburyNY #SupportLocal #supportlocalbusinesses
